visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with a black beret and a navy blue off-the-shoulder top stands in front of a glass-door freezer aisle in a large warehouse store. She holds a purple box of I-MEI Ube Boba Ice Bars, pointing at it while speaking to the camera. The background is filled with frozen food products and price tags. (2) The scene shifts to a brighter indoor setting where two women are seated at a marble table. They are both holding the unpacked ice cream bars, which feature a distinct purple top layer and a white bottom layer. A close-up shot reveals brown boba pearls embedded within the creamy texture of the bitten bar. (3) The two women continue to taste the ice cream, showing expressive facial reactions of enjoyment. The background includes household items, such as plush toys and a small white dog sitting in a pet stroller, lit by warm indoor lighting. The camera uses medium shots and close-ups to emphasize the product's texture.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 義美 紫薯雙層波霸雪糕. (2) [Slogan]: BOBA ICE BAR. [Subtitle]: 539元有12個. [Variety]: 19.9. (3) [Subtitle]: 一支不用20塊 19.9. [Variety]: 紫薯波霸. (4) [Subtitle]: 每一個只要19.9元. [Variety]: 芋頭雪糕的味道. (5) [Subtitle]: 下面比較是芋頭雪糕的味道. [Variety]: 最完美. (6) [Subtitle]: 這樣甜度最完美. [Variety]: 很多層次. (7) [Subtitle]: 每一口都有很多層次. [Variety]: 需要一直嚼的冰棒. (8) [Subtitle]: 這是一款需要一直嚼的冰棒. [Variety]: 越嚼越香喔.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators reviewing the product.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman in a navy blue off-the-shoulder top and black beret; another woman in a light purple top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First in a Costco freezer aisle with commercial refrigerator doors; later in an indoor home setting with plush toys and a pet stroller.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice begins narrating at a fast pace, describing a shopping find in a warehouse. Bright, upbeat electronic pop music plays at a moderate tempo in the background. The speech is clear with frequent rising intonations to express excitement. (2) A second female voice joins, creating a conversational dynamic. Both voices maintain high emotional arousal and positive valence. Short percussive SFX, such as subtle pops, emphasize transitions in the conversation as they begin a product review. (3) The dialogue continues with both speakers sharing opinions. The BGM remains constant, providing a joyful rhythmic bed. Vocal expressions like soft giggles and emphatic phrases are audible, maintaining a friendly and persuasive tone throughout the tasting session.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and review a specific brand of Ube Boba Ice Bar available at Costco, highlighting its price, appearance, and taste profile to encourage viewers to purchase it.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The speaker explicitly names the brand I-MEI and the retailer Costco, showing the packaging and pricing.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively combines on-site shopping footage with an indoor review to build authenticity.
